content:
## Souper-Model: Arithmetic for LLM Enhancement

Leverage arithmetic operations and mathematical patterns to enhance LLM performance on reasoning tasks, improving accuracy through symbolic computation and pattern recognition.

### Core Concept

Arithmetic-driven enhancements to LLM reasoning capabilities

### Key Techniques

This skill focuses on implementing approaches from research in agent reasoning, model optimization, and system scaling.

### Implementation

For implementation details, refer to the source paper at https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.13254

### Practical Guidance

- **When to use**: When solving mathematical reasoning problems or optimizing LLM computation
- **Integration**: Use with other agent skills for comprehensive systems
- **Scaling**: Consider performance trade-offs when applying at scale

### Reference

Paper: Souper-Model: How Simple Arithmetic Unlocks State-of-the-Art LLM Performance
arXiv: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.13254
